prompt:
kevinlucbert_style. Small decorative motif for a premium photobook interior page.

A single mountain rock or boulder, isolated and centered on a pure white background. Large empty space around the object. The rock occupies roughly 15% of the canvas.

The rock is rendered as bold simplified flat shapes. Each facet filled with dense directional pen lines — lines follow the surface contour, different directions on different planes. Vibrant flat color: warm grey-orange or burnt red for the main mass, deep blue or purple for shadow facets.

Floating isolated object, not touching any ground surface. No ground, no shadow, no grass, no environment, no scene. Single object only.

Must feel like a quiet decorative fragment on a printed page. Legible at 2–3cm printed width.
